Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in variants where both appear sequentially
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average cycle time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed versus when followed by other reviewer-related activities such as SW-Reviewer Declined or SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed, compared to variants that do not include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Manuscript Export Succeeded in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed eventually occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total resolution time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in end-to-end variants that culminate in RW-EIC Accept, specifically measuring duration until final acceptance after SW-Reviewer Agreed is recorded
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'RW-EIC Accept'

Name: Time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the subsequent Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed precedes the revision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Minimum time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Awaiting Assignment to Batch in variants that contain SW-Reviewer Agreed, indicating downstream processing efficiency post-reviewer agreement
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Reviewer Agreed after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in the context of major revision cycles (e.g., following SW–Major Revision due in 1 month)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'filter': "activity == 'SW–Major Revision due in 1 month'"}"
